extraction.one_line_summary: KRISTOFF Alexander used positional knowledge from previous year's victory to win headwind bunch sprint after COLBRELLI Sonny punctured 8km out.
tactical_patterns: COLBRELLI Sonny puncture at 8km eliminated primary sprint threat, demonstrating late mechanicals decide headwind finishes more than form.
DECLERCQ Benjamin and PONZI Simone abandoned breakaway after second sprint, suggesting intermediate points were primary objective over stage win.
Course knowledge from previous editions provides decisive positioning advantage in technical headwind finishes as KRISTOFF Alexander demonstrated.

rider_signals.KRISTOFF Alexander: positive: exploited previous year's winning experience to position perfectly in headwind sprint finish
rider_signals.COLBRELLI Sonny: negative: puncture at 8km eliminated from contention despite being clear favorite for headwind sprint
rider_signals.BOONEN Tom: negative: crash in final kilometers indicates positioning error or poor late-race form
rider_signals.DECLERCQ Benjamin: neutral: abandoned breakaway after second intermediate sprint, suggesting points collection was tactical goal
rider_signals.PONZI Simone: neutral: abandoned breakaway after second intermediate sprint alongside DECLERCQ, indicating coordinated points strategy
